description: You are a theatrical sound designer preparing a playback session for a play using the Director's Cue Sheet at /home/ga/Audio/cue_sheet.txt. Configure the session with three tracks named 'Cue 1 Preshow', 'Cue 2 Prologue', and 'Cue 3 Intermission'. Place /home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav on 'Cue 1 Preshow' at 00:00:00 with a 5-second fade-out at the end of the region. Place /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav on 'Cue 2 Prologue' at 00:02:00. Place /home/ga/Audio/samples/moonlight_sonata.wav on 'Cue 3 Intermission' at 00:05:00 with the track gain set to -10 dB. Add session markers 'House Lights Down' at 00:01:55 and 'Act 1 End' at 00:04:55. Save the session.
